name: Regata Storica
traditions: Historical boat procession on Grand Canal; gondola and multi-oar boat races; 16th-century costumes; Bucintoro replica.
historicalBackground: The Regata Storica dates to 1315 and is Venice's most important traditional event, celebrating the city's maritime heritage and gondolier skill.
description: Venice's spectacular historic regatta, a pageant of Renaissance-costumed boats and fierce gondola races on the Grand Canal.
